tasks.step_title: Clarify the outcome in one sentence
tasks.decomposition: Define what success looks like for this task. Write one clear, specific sentence that captures the end state. This becomes your north star.
tasks.passion_anchor: This clarity will guide every decision you make in the next hour.
tasks.urgency_cue: 5 minutes to define the finish line

tasks.step_title: Sketch the shape of the first draft
tasks.decomposition: Don't write yet—just map it out. Outline the main sections and flow. Decide if it's 3 parts or 7. This structure is your scaffold.
tasks.deliverable: A rough outline or structure diagram
tasks.passion_anchor: A strong structure makes the writing flow naturally.

tasks.decomposition: Hook the reader in the first three sentences. Set the context and tone. Make them want to keep reading. This is where momentum builds.
tasks.passion_anchor: A great opening is the hardest part—you're almost through it.

tasks.decomposition: Follow your outline. One idea per paragraph. Use the opening momentum. Don't overthink—you can refine later. Keep the energy up.
tasks.deliverable: Completed body sections with all main points
tasks.passion_anchor: The rough draft is the hardest milestone—you're in the home stretch.

tasks.decomposition: Wrap up your argument. Restate the key insight. Leave the reader with a clear takeaway or call to action. Make it memorable.
tasks.passion_anchor: A good ending is what they remember—nail this moment.

tasks.decomposition: Read it aloud. Note confusing sections. Check paragraph transitions. Ensure each idea flows naturally into the next. Mark anything unclear.
tasks.deliverable: A marked-up draft with clarity notes
tasks.passion_anchor: Fresh eyes catch what you couldn't see before.

tasks.decomposition: Tighten awkward phrasing. Cut unnecessary words. Check tone consistency. Replace vague words with precise ones. Polish every sentence.
tasks.deliverable: A polished draft with tight language
tasks.passion_anchor: Great writing is rewritten. This is where the magic happens.

tasks.decomposition: Do a final proofread for typos. Format for your platform. Add any required metadata or headers. Do one last read-through. You're ready.
tasks.passion_anchor: You've built something you can be proud of.
